allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); mcp=d.get\('mcpServers', {}\); print\(json.dumps\(list\(mcp.keys\(\)\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ok:', d.get\('success'\)\); f = d.get\('data',{}\).get\('financials'\); print\('has financials:', bool\(f\)\); print\('periods:', len\(\(f or {}\).get\('periods'\) or []\)\); print\('company:', \(f or {}\).get\('companyName'\)\); print\('formType:', \(f or {}\).get\('formType'\)\); print\('isAnnual:', \(f or {}\).get\('isAnnual'\)\); s = \(f or {}\).get\('summary',{}\); print\('swot counts — s/w/o/t:', len\(s.get\('strengths'\) or []\), len\(s.get\('weaknesses'\) or []\), len\(s.get\('opportunities'\) or []\), len\(s.get\('threats'\) or []\)\); print\('fwd:', len\(s.get\('forwardLooking'\) or []\)\); r = \(f or {}\).get\('incomeRatios',{}\); print\('grossMargin:', r.get\('grossMargin'\), 'opMargin:', r.get\('operatingMargin'\), 'revYoY:', r.get\('revenueGrowthYoY'\)\); cr = \(f or {}\).get\('cashFlowRatios',{}\); print\('fcf:', cr.get\('freeCashFlow'\), 'fcfMargin:', cr.get\('fcfMargin'\), 'CFO/NI:', cr.get\('earningsQuality'\)\)")
